ety: inf. n. of وفي 'to perform a promise,' &c.
def: s.f. Performing (or performance of) a promise, keeping an engagement; fulfilment; — observation of good faith, faithfulness, fidelity; sincerity; gratitude; — sufficing; a sufficiency; a completing or filling up; completion, conclusion, end

Faithfulness; fidelity. vafā k. , v. n. To be true, faithful, loyal. Uskī umr ne vafā na kī . His life departed like a faithless one. (His life did not fulfil its promise). be-vafā , adj False; faithless; treacherous. Nauj tum par kisī kā jī nikle! Tum baṛe be-vafā ajī nikle! Wom. Jān Sāhab. May never heart be set on you! You are so faithless and untrue! be-vafāī , n. f. Faithlessness; inconstancy.

Fidelity, the observance of good faith. وفا پيشه wafā-pesha, adj. Faithful, practising good faith. وفا دار wafā-dār, Faithful, sincere, constant. وفا داري wafā-dār-ī, s. f. Faithfulness, constancy, sincerity. وفا کرنا wafā-karnā, To suffice, to perform (a promise). وفا کيش wafā-kesh, Faithful.

The inflected forms are formed by analogy with its proximal counterpart یِہ (ye). For Old Hindi वो (vo), Chatterji suggested a derivation from Apabhramsa ओ (o), from Sanskrit *अव (*ava), attested in अवोष् (avoṣ), अवोर् (avor, “of you both”, gen. du.), from Proto-Indo…

ety: P. wāh; A. wāh, wāha, wāhi, wāhā
def: intj. O! bravo! well done; excellent! — how strange! you don't say so! what a joke! very likely indeed! — fie!; — alas! (i.q. wā)
more: intj. See aur kyā under اور 1. Excellent. 1. Vāh kyā talvār kā hāth mārā! 2. Vāh! yeh kām maiṅ ne kab kīyā thā! 2. How strange! what a joke! you dont say so! Ikhtilāt āp se aur mujh se kahāṅ kā aisā, Vāh jī! jān na pahchān yeh gālī denā! When intimate were you and I to this degree? How excellent! your bawdy jests to filing at me! 3. Bravo! well done! vāh vāh k. , v. n. To applaud; clap hands. vāh vāh h., yā machnā , v. n. To be applauded. vāh re maiṅ! Well done me! none like me! Dekh-kar āīnā kahtā hai 'vāh re maiṅ!'
f. interj. (expressive of admiration, grief or fear) Bravo! well done! excellent! alas! fy! واه وا يا واه wāh-wā, or -wāh, f. Bravo! bravo! how excellent! how strange! admirable! Ha!

def: pron. That, the; that person; that thing; — he, she, it; — (pl.) those; they (i.q. we); — (by wǒh, 'he,' a wife refers to her husband, it being considered disrespectful to take his name)
more: pron. 1. He; she; it; that. 2. ( ve ) They. Gālib vazīfah-khār ho, do shāh ko duā! Voh din gaë ki kahte the naukar nahīṅ hūṅ maiṅ . Gālib. Gālib! a pensioner you are, may Heaven bless the king! Gone are the days when you were wont 'No servant I' to sing. 3. By ' voh' he, a wife refers to her husband as a mark of respect, it being considered disrespectful to take his name. 1. Ḍolī ke sāth lāl kue se na āë voh, Bī, kaise ḍāṅvāṅ-ḍol phire haiṅ kahār āj! Wom. Rāhat. 2. Prītam aisī prīt kar jaise soṭā bhaṅg, Voh toṛe vā-kī pāṅsrī vah lipṭe vā-ke aṅg . Your love should be as hempen leaf towards the pestle shows, She clasps his body closer while he breaks her ribs with blows. voh jo . That which; who; what. voh shakhs jis par ḍigrī ho . G. G. The person against whom a decree is issued.
pron. That, he, she, it, the; (occasionally like وي) they, those.
pron. plur. (dakh.) for وي we, They, those.
subs: or wah dekho, See there; there he (or it) is, le voilà; — wah ātā hai, There he (or it) comes

The inflected forms are formed by analogy with its proximal counterpart یِہ (ye).
